org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.graphics

extends Object

    • Method Detail

      • setFactory

        public static void setFactory(ViewGraphicsUtil.Factory factory)
        Change the inner factory.
        Parameters:
        factory - is the new factory.

      • createViewGraphics

        public static ViewGraphics2D createViewGraphics(VectorGraphics2D g,
                                boolean antialiasing,
                                boolean isForPrinting)
        Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.
        Parameters:
        g -
        antialiasing - permits to force the anti-aliasing flag for the target graphical context
        isForPrinting - indicates if this graphics environment is for printing or not.
        Returns:
        the view vector.

      • createViewGraphics

        public static ViewGraphics2D createViewGraphics(VectorGraphics2D g,
                                boolean antialiasing,
                                boolean isForPrinting,
                                Graphics2DLOD lod)
        Create a ViewGraphics2D that is delegating to the given VectorGraphics2D.
        Parameters:
        g -
        antialiasing - permits to force the anti-aliasing flag for the target graphical context
        isForPrinting - indicates if this graphics environment is for printing or not.
        lod - is the desired Level-Of-Details
        Returns:
        the view vector.
